Notice And Motion To Vacate Order Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Joseph J. Siguenza, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Plaintiffs' Motion to Vacate Order of Dismissal is scheduled this day. After argument of counsel the court ordered motion granted. Dismissal issued on 10/19/209 is ordered set aside. Court ordered the outstanding sanctions of $1050.00 reduced to $350.00 payable within ten days. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause on 6/1/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
